channel.title: Iced Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Iced Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is Iced Coffee? The Complete Guide to Every Iced Coffee Drink (Iced Latte, Americano, Mocha, Macchiato, Cappuccino, Flat White, and More)
item.description: Iced coffee is a family of cold coffee drinks — from black iced drip and the iced latte to the iced caramel macchiato, iced americano, iced mocha, iced cappuccino, iced flat white, and the iced macchiato. This guide covers the 1840 Algerian Mazagran origin, the 1860s Vienna café glacé era, the 1920s American refrigeration boom, and the 1995 Starbucks Frappuccino, with a deep section on each drink and full comparison tables.
